meta.title: Mozey — All Museums in One App
meta.description: Discover 281 museums and 101 historical places across Uzbekistan. Offline mode, 3 languages, dark mode, and much more.

hero.title: Mozey
hero.subtitle: Discover the Heritage of the Great Silk Road
hero.description: Explore 281 museums and 101 historical places across Uzbekistan in one app. Works offline, available in 3 languages.

features.title: Why Our App?
features.subtitle: All the tools you need to explore the cultural heritage of Uzbekistan

offline.title: Offline Mode
offline.description: Works without an internet connection. Access information about all museums even in airplane mode.

languages.title: 3 Languages
languages.description: Complete information in Uzbek, Russian, and English. Switch languages with a single tap.

museums.title: 281+ Museums
museums.description: A complete database of museums across all 14 regions of Uzbekistan.

darkMode.title: Dark Mode
darkMode.description: Eye-friendly dark theme. Easily switch between day and night modes.

search.title: Quick Search
search.description: Instantly find museums by name, city, or region.

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.description: Save your favorite museums and quickly find them later.

screenshots.title: See Inside the App
screenshots.subtitle: Modern design with an intuitive interface

statistics.title: Cultural Heritage of Uzbekistan
statistics.subtitle: Discover one of the richest cultural heritages in the world

download.title: Download Now
download.subtitle: Carry the museums of Uzbekistan in your pocket. Free for iOS and Android.
download.qrHint: Scan the QR code or tap a button

footer.description: The best app for exploring the museums of Uzbekistan. Built by Mozey.
